# Feature Request Template

## Feature Description
_A clear and concise description of the feature you want._

## Problem It Solves
_What problem does this feature solve? Why do you need it?_

## Proposed Solution
_How do you think this feature should work?_

## Alternatives Considered
_What alternatives have you considered? Why did you choose this approach?_

## Additional Context
_Any mockups, examples, or other context that would help understand the request._

---

## Compatibility Considerations
- Should this work on **ash** (OpenWRT, minimal systems)?
- Should this work on **bash only**?
- Should this require additional dependencies?

## Priority
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would use often
- [ ] Critical (can't use without it)

---

Thanks for the suggestion!
